description: Complete Level 1 of the 'Programming Maze' activity in GCompris by guiding Tux to the goal. Once Level 1 is finished and Level 2 loads, save a screenshot of the Level 2 maze to '/home/ga/Documents/programming_maze_level2.png' and a screenshot showing the completion of Level 1 to '/home/ga/Documents/programming_maze_complete.png'.
